patches.hypothesis: The method overfits previously by checking the option's name only when there was an '=' sign. To make the flatten method more robust, ensure that each token's validity as an option is verified consistently, even when it includes an '='. This prevents unrecognized option names from blocking arguments processing or being misinterpreted.
patches.original_hypothesis: The method was incorrectly parsing options with '=' in them, treating them as two separate tokens, causing incorrect tokenization and an increased count of processed tokens.
